findings.title: Required bare bun test CI gate fails from the reviewed worktree
findings.description: The ticket requires CI to run bare bun test plus tsc --noEmit, and .github/workflows/ci.yml now does run bare bun test. Re-running bun test from this worktree exits 1: the safety-hook approval POC tests call new ApprovalGateServer(0), but Bun.serve fails to start with port 0, causing three beforeAll failures. This contradicts the green full-suite evidence and means the machine CI gate is not actually green.

findings.title: Matcher output is not deterministic because it mints random decision ids
findings.description: The ticket asks for a trivial deterministic matcher that maps a transcript line to a CueDecision, and the smoke slice is meant to be record-replay friendly. match() calls randomUUID() for every observation, so the same fixture replay produces different CueDecision and trace metadata across runs. The smoke test only checks that decisionId is truthy, so it does not prove deterministic replay behavior.
